title: Draria
content:

|region=*[[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]<ref name="Location">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} places the [[Draria system/Legends|Draria system]], and therefore Draria itself, in grid square M-7 as part of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region's]] [[Lostar sector/Legends|Lostar sector]]. Furthermore, ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places that [[Star system/Legends|star system]] in the [[Northern Dependencies/Legends|Northern Dependencies]], and ''[[Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters]]'' establishes the Lostar [[Sector/Legends|sector]] to have been a part of the [[Outer Expansion Zone/Legends|Outer Expansion Zone]], which the [[Star Wars: Force and Destiny Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Force and Destiny'' Core Rulebook]] further defines as a sub-region located in the northern section of the Expansion Region. Therefore, Draria must also have been a part of the Outer Expansion Zone.</ref>

'''Draria''' was a celestial body<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref> located in the [[Draria system/Legends|Draria system]]. It was a part of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region's]] [[Lostar sector/Legends|Lostar sector]], being located both in the [[Outer Expansion Zone/Legends|Outer Expansion Zone]] sub-region and the [[Northern Dependencies/Legends|Northern Dependencies]] portion of that region.<ref name="Location" /> Draria lay between the [[Adin system/Legends|Adin]] and [[Viga system/Legends|Viga systems]] on the [[Super-hyperroute/Legends|super-hyperroute]] known as the [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]],<ref name="EGTW" /> specifically the segment that was known as the [[Corsin Run]] before being incorporated into the larger [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace route]] by approximately [[3693 BBY]].<ref name="TEA" />

In a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Task Force on Alliance Security]] [[SecuriDex]] [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] on the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] group known as the [[Granse Confederacy]] that was submitted<ref name="AIR" /> at some point by [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> Draria was listed as the last known location for five of the group's members: the [[Human/Legends|Humans]] [[Callandri]] and [[Zayl Braith]], the [[Tunroth]] [[Kiran Tatch]], the [[Ubese/Legends|Ubese]] [[Arcuse]], and the [[Gand/Legends|Gand]] [[Lu'daal-ud]].<ref name="AIR" /> Between [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] and [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]], Draria was situated within the borders of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="EGTW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Draria was mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="AIR" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' subsequently placed the Draria [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body itself, in grid square M-7.<ref name="TEA" />
